chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 973 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.8. 2. For orders on CMA No.4329/2024. 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA No.4330/2024. 13.11.2025 Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, advocate for the applicant. Mr. Rahat Naseem, Assistant Director, I&I, FBR, Karachi Under instructions, counsel does not press this reference application, the same is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
